api.auth: API key (x-goog-api-key header or ?key= query param)

prompting.responds_best_to: Short, explicit, single-purpose prompts with the format spelled out.
prompting.system_prompt_prefix: Be concise; return only the requested output in the exact format.

quirks: UNVERIFIED version string at dossier creation — confirm availability before routing
Excellent cost and speed for large-input tasks
Instruction-following looser than peers — give an example
Best for cheap summarization and extraction over big documents

handoff.output_format_instruction: Demand strict format and supply an example.
handoff.evaluation_notes: Verify completeness and format adherence; escalate to a Pro tier if reasoning was needed.
